job.title: Senior Laravel + Claude SDK contractor
job.description: We run a PrestaShop store doing 40k orders/mo and want to add an LLM-powered support copilot to our existing Laravel admin. Looking for 4-6 weeks fixed scope. Stack: Laravel 10, PrestaShop 8, Postgres, Vue. Budget $90-130/hr equivalent. EU TZ preferred. Need someone who has actually shipped LLM features to paying customers — not a tutorial follower. Reply with brief examples of prior work.

job.title: Senior Fullstack AI Engineer (Remote, EU)
job.description: Building AI tools for e-commerce SMBs. Laravel/PHP backend, Vue frontend, Claude SDK + Ollama on the agent side. Need someone with 6+ years of production fullstack experience who can own LLM features end-to-end. Fully remote, EU-friendly hours, async-first. Equity + comp band 90-140k EUR.

job.title: Junior React Developer
job.description: Looking for a junior frontend dev to join our team. 0-2 years experience. React, TypeScript, Tailwind. Will train. On-site preferred in Berlin but remote within Germany possible. Comp 35-50k EUR.

job.title: Senior Rust Systems Engineer
job.description: Need a senior Rust engineer to work on a high-performance distributed systems project. 5+ years of Rust in production. No web stack, no AI/ML — pure infra work. Remote OK.

job.title: AI Engineer
job.description: We're a stealth-mode startup building something with AI. Looking for an engineer who can ship fast. Stack TBD. Comp TBD. We need someone passionate about AI. Apply now!

job.title: WordPress fix
job.description: Need someone to fix a few bugs on our WordPress site. Should take 5-10 hours total. Budget $20-30/hr. Available immediately preferred.

job.title: Senior Fullstack Engineer — On-site Munich
job.description: Looking for a senior fullstack engineer to join our team in Munich. Mandatory on-site, 4 days/week minimum. Stack: PHP, Laravel, Vue. Great team. Excellent compensation.

job.title: Senior Fullstack — E-commerce Platform
job.description: Senior fullstack engineer to work on our e-commerce platform serving 1000+ merchants. Stack: PHP, Laravel, Vue, Postgres. Remote, EU TZ. AI/ML adjacent — we're starting to ship LLM features into the merchant dashboard.

job.title: Need PrestaShop module developer
job.description: Looking for a PrestaShop module developer for a 3-week engagement. Building a payment integration module for a client. Senior level preferred. Budget $80/hr. Remote. Starts in 2 weeks.

job.title: Marketing Manager, Content & AI Enablement
job.description: We are looking for a Marketing Manager to lead our content marketing and AI enablement initiatives. Experience with content strategy required. Light technical background a plus. Remote US-only.
